step_rationale: Circulating endothelial cell and microparticle marker; erosion biomarker.
mechanism: Soluble CD146 and circulating CD146+ endothelial cells and microparticles mark endothelial injury, erosion, and post-MI angiogenesis.

references.title: Plasma Levels of Soluble CD146 Reflect the Severity of Pulmonary Congestion Better Than Brain Natriuretic Peptide in Acute Coronary Syndrome.

Microparticle release in remote ischemic conditioning mechanism.
references.journal: American journal of physiology. Heart and circulatory physiology
